productDisplayName: Q&Q Women Pink Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!   Product Details Case style: Pink plastic round case with a rotating bezel Dial style: Pink dial with white and silver hands Strap style: Pink plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 5 BAR, allowing you to wear it even when showering Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 7 mm
